package repository

import "context"

// ErrorLogsRepository is a draft repository boundary for errorLogs.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type ErrorLogsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query ErrorLogsQuery) ([]ErrorLog, error)
}

type ErrorLogsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
